extension.description: Generate context, rules, and skills for Cursor in your repo: analyze the project and produce documentation by area plus rules with skill allocation.
command.gerarContexto: Default Context Generator: Generate project context
command.apontarOuCriarConfig: Default Context Generator: Set or create config file
command.abrirNoChat: Default Context Generator: Open in chat (copy prompt and open chat)
command.agentLogin: Default Context Generator: Log in to Cursor CLI
config.title: Default Context Generator
config.configPath.description: Path to the config file (prompt). Empty = use the default bot prompt. Can be .txt (text = prompt) or .json with a "prompt" field.
config.autoGenerate.description: If enabled, run context generation automatically when a workspace is opened and has no context. Off by default; enable in settings if you want this behavior.
config.autoGenerateOnlyWhenMissing.descr: When auto-generate is on: only run if docs/context/ or .cursor/rules/ are missing or empty. Reduces redundant runs and client usage.
config.repoLanguage.description: Default repository language for generated context (docs and rules). When "Ask every time", the language picker is shown when generating from the command palette.
config.model.description: Agent model for context generation (e.g. claude-4-6-sonnet). Empty = Cursor default. Used for auto-run and as default in the model selector.
